other_observers: George Steele, Mark Miller and Carol Ortenzio.  First found and photographed by George Steele at his feeder on 10/17/2020.
description: Very small Dove: much smaller than the several Eurasian Collared-Doves that were also present.  Quite rufous body, with a gray head. Vertical black markings on the wings. Very short tail seen when bird flew in and departed. Not seen by outside observers when descended to the feeder inside the wall. Bird was too rufous to be a Common Ground-Dove.
